title: Pleasingly Crunchy Middle Eastern Amaretti Kebabs
description: A kid-friendly Middle Eastern dish featuring crunchy amaretti and vegetarian-friendly ingredients, perfect for a snack or dessert. This recipe combines the sweetness of amaretti with the crunch of toasted nuts and seeds.
instructions: Preheat the oil in a deep frying pan to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a bowl, mix together the crushed amaretti, pistachio meal, sesame seeds, and a pinch of salt.
Add the honey, rose water, and vegetable oil to the bowl and mix until a dough forms.
Divide the dough into 12 equal pieces and shape each piece into a ball.
Roll each ball in the toasted pine nuts and shredded coconut to coat.
Fry the amaretti balls in the hot oil for 2-3 minutes on each side, or until golden brown.
Remove the fried amaretti balls from the oil and place them on a paper towel-lined plate to drain excess oil.
Serve the crunchy amaretti kebabs warm and enjoy.
If desired, skewer the amaretti balls onto wooden sticks or skewers for a fun and easy snack.
